name: Omni-Cart
description: Context-aware browser extension that translates maker inspiration into a parts list.

content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts allow-forms allow-popups allow-modals allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://maps.googleapis.com; child-src 'self';
